summary_base: Engineer with a strong interest in the AI field. I have experience in process automation, handling large data volumes, and software development. I believe I can bring new perspectives given my background in other industries. I am strongly motivated by intellectual challenges of any kind.

experience.description: Development and maintenance of microservices for an ad-server company.
responsibilities: Development and maintenance of web interfaces used by external and internal clients using JavaScript, jQuery, HTML and CSS with server-side and client-side rendering.
Implementation of frontend functionalities integrated with backend services within the ad-server platform.
Development of REST APIs, handlers and endpoints for internal and external consumption within the ad-server service ecosystem.
Daily work in Linux development environments using virtual machines hosted on internal servers.
Development of scripts for internal process automation using Python, Perl, SQL and Bash.
Implementation of extraction, transformation and load (ETL) processes to automate information processing flows.
Integration with internal APIs to retrieve data, process it and store it in databases, handling XML and JSON responses.
Development of automated statistical reports based on large data volumes.
Construction of report generation pipelines including SQL queries, backend logic, validations and dashboard visualization.
Analysis and processing of large-scale datasets from the ad-serving system.
Optimization of SQL queries over large data volumes.
Implementation of query optimization strategies using indexes, optimized joins and temporary tables.
Working with partitioned database schemas and sharding, where each client has its own data shard.
Querying and processing information distributed across multiple shards.
Use of merge tables and different data grouping strategies to optimize query times.
Development of complex queries requiring data pre-filtering to reduce processed volume.
Performance optimization of analytical queries used for reports and metrics.
Development of real-time advertising algorithms (real-time bidding / ad matching).
Implementation of ad matching logic using C and Lua.
Working with shared memory structures (shm-tables) for real-time data processing.
Analysis of advertising algorithm behavior from statistical metrics.
Development and maintenance of adapters used to integrate external systems using JavaScript and Go.
Implementation of integrations between different components of the ad-serving system.
Participation in the development and maintenance of microservices within the system architecture.
Development and execution of unit tests to validate new functionalities.
API testing through functional tests.
Implementation of integration tests using Selenium.
Statistical validation of reports and metrics generated by the systems.
Application of design patterns such as Factory in component development.
Working under Kanban agile methodology.
Task management and tracking using Jira.
Version control using Git, GitHub and SVN.
Collaboration with other developers within the team workflow.
Use of Claude Code as an artificial intelligence tool for development and programming assistance.
Technical problem solving in testing environments.
Access to testing and production servers via SSH.
Intensive use of Linux terminal for development, debugging and script execution.
Analysis and resolution of incidents related to backend processes and report generation.
Validation of processed data before exposure in dashboards or APIs.

experience.description: Development of assembly lines for an automotive company.
responsibilities: Participation in automotive product industrialization projects from initial stages to plant launch.
Development of assembly lines for new products within the plant.
Analysis of product and quality requirements together with quality and product engineers.
Translation of internal technical requirements into supplier specifications.
Preliminary definition of assembly devices considering product and quality requirements.
Participation in planning production processes required for new product manufacturing.
Calculation of estimated demand and material consumption analysis for process dimensioning.
Productive capacity calculations.
Production takt time analysis.
Calculation of operation times and labor times.
Analysis of inter-operation times within the production line.
Estimation of storage capacity needed to supply the production process.
Joint work with the logistics area to define storage strategies.
Definition of safety stock levels.
Analysis of material consumption within the production process.
Dimensioning of storage areas within the plant.
Definition of appropriate storage types for materials and components.
Calculation and definition of work-in-process (WIP) product buffers.
Plant layout design considering production flow.
Assembly line layout design.
Optimization of internal logistics flow within the plant.
Analysis of material flow within the production process.
Integration of quality considerations into process design.
Search for process flow optimization and inefficiency reduction.
Development of technical specifications for assembly devices.
Development of technical specifications for storage devices.
Preparation of technical sheets used to request design and manufacturing from suppliers.
Supplier selection for device and equipment manufacturing.
Technical coordination with suppliers during the design process.
Follow-up on device development and manufacturing at supplier plants.
Technical audits at supplier plants.
Verification of device and equipment manufacturing status.
Supplier planning follow-up to ensure alignment with the project schedule.
Device reception at the plant and technical testing.
Validation of assembly device functionality.
Production tests on assembly lines.
Training of plant personnel on device and process usage.
Productivity optimization during initial line tests.
Continuous improvement of line performance seeking to maximize parts per hour.
Preparation of technical process documentation.
Development of process flow diagrams.
Creation of process sheets.
Development of quality control plans.
Preparation of FMEA (Failure Mode and Effect Analysis).
Definition and monitoring of KPI indicators for the production process.

certifications.name: Linux: Command Line and Shell Scripting
